## Description

<!-- Brief summary of the change and why it's needed -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat`: new feature
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `chore`: tooling / config / dependency
- [ ] `docs`: documentation only
- [ ] `refactor`: internal change, no behavior difference

## Testing

- [ ] Tested in-game on TBC Classic Anniversary (2.5.5 / Interface 20505)
- [ ] `luac -p Core.lua Classes.lua Calc.lua Aura.lua UI.lua Settings.lua` passes
- [ ] No new Lua errors visible with `/console scriptErrors 1`
- [ ] `/uh debug` output matches the values shown in the character pane (for number-affecting changes)
- [ ] Tested on at least one supported class (Warrior / Paladin / Druid) — note which
